docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF LISA MAINETTI AND DEFENDANT AMY MAINETTI. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
